vocab.meaning: một sự thay đổi cực kỳ lớn/quan trọng
vocab.example: There has been a tectonic shift in my hobbies, moving from high-energy sports to more tranquil, intellectual pursuits.

vocab.meaning: sự tham gia/vận dụng trí tuệ
vocab.example: Nowadays, I prioritize cerebral engagement, such as strategy games, over the purely physical activities I adored as a youngster.

vocab.meaning: mất đi sức hút/sự thú vị vốn có
vocab.example: While playing with action figures was my life back then, that kind of play has long since lost its luster for me.

vocab.meaning: sự tao nhã khi làm một mình (trau dồi bản thân)
vocab.example: I’ve transitioned from boisterous group play to solitary refinement, finding peace in playing the piano or reading.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác hưng phấn bản năng/mạnh mẽ
vocab.example: The visceral thrill of climbing trees has been replaced by the quiet satisfaction of a morning jog.

vocab.meaning: đòi hỏi nhiều về mặt trí tuệ/căng não
vocab.example: I now gravitate toward intellectually taxing hobbies like coding, which would have been far too complex for my childhood self.

vocab.meaning: sự tiến hóa/thay đổi về mặt giải trí
vocab.example: My recreational evolution reflects my growing maturity; I now seek out meaningful experiences rather than just fast-paced fun.

vocab.meaning: sự nhiệt huyết không chút ngại ngùng
vocab.example: As a child, I had an unabashed enthusiasm for mud-wrestling with friends, a hobby that certainly hasn't followed me into adulthood.

vocab.meaning: trưởng thành/thay đổi đến mức không nhận ra
vocab.example: My taste in leisure activities has matured beyond recognition since my primary school days.

vocab.meaning: sự giải tỏa cảm xúc/tâm trí
vocab.example: While I used to play just to win, I now view my hobbies as a cathartic release from the stresses of professional life.
